author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Phase 5.1 shipped in 4a545828. Backend: crosslink/src/dashboard/export.rs (4 endpoints under /api/v1/dashboard/export, 11 tests incl. RFC4180 escaping branches). Frontend: dashboard/src/lib/download.ts (auth-carrying blob downloader) + components/ExportMenu.tsx (CSV/JSON pill buttons, busy/error state) mounted on ProjectGrid and Alerts headers, 6 vitest cases. All 49 dashboard tests + tsc + clippy clean. Screenshot export deferred to a browser-side follow-up — no server hop needed.
